paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

There are no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes an announcement from July 21, 2026, that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026, for its second quarter 2026 earnings release.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A on July 21, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
